title: Failed to locate type
rationale: Unresolved Fern HTTP response type references come from user-authored API definitions and are now classified as validation errors at the response conversion boundary instead of reportable internal resolution failures.
fixSummary: Convert response-type resolution failures during HTTP response conversion into non-reportable validation errors.
problemSignature: IR generation failed to locate a referenced Fern type; possible reference/resolution product bug until validated.
